question: Give me the name of the vocal soloist most recorded by Radio France in 2014

output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ecrm: <http://erlangen-crm.org/current/>
PREFIX efrbroo: <http://erlangen-crm.org/efrbroo/>
SELECT ?performance ?time_span WHERE {
  ?performance efrbroo:R20_recorded ?recorded_by .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?recorded_by), "Radio France"))
  ?performance ecrm:P4_has_time-span ?time_span .
  ?time_span rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?label, "2014"))
} LIMIT 10

SELECT ?performer (COUNT(?performer) as ?count) WHERE {
  # Radio France organization
  <http://data.doremus.org/organization/Radio_France> ecrm:P128_is_carried_out_by ?manifestation .
  
  # Recordings created in 2014
  ?manifestation efrbroo:R17_created ?creation .
  FILTER (YEAR(?creation) = 2014)
  
  # Performers of the recordings
  ?manifestation efrbroo:R25_performed ?performer .
  
  # Performers with soloist responsibility
  ?performer efrbroo:U36_foresees_responsibility <http://data.doremus.org/vocabulary/responsibility/soloist> .
} GROUP BY ?performer ORDER BY DESC(?count) LIMIT 1
